title: Harry and the Butler
actors: Osvald Helmuth, Ebbe Rode, Gunnar Lauring
plot: Set in the late fifties in Denmark the poor junk yard assistant Harry inherits some money. He decides to use the money to hire a butler. The butler isn't too keen on the job at first, but he takes it because there aren't that many...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 3 nominations total
